items.example: I usually wake up at about 6.30.

items.phrase: I have to leave home by…
items.translation: Мне нужно выйти из дома к…
items.example: I have to leave home by 8.30 at the latest.

items.phrase: The first thing I do when I get to work is…
items.translation: Первое, что я делаю, придя на работу —…
items.example: The first thing I do when I get to work is switch on the lights.
In the afternoon I usually have lunch with colleagues.

items.phrase: I try to be home by…
items.example: I try to be home by about 7 o'clock.

items.phrase: I just cook supper and watch TV
items.translation: Я просто готовлю ужин и смотрю телевизор
items.example: In the evening I just cook supper and watch some television.

items.phrase: The best part of the job is…
items.example: The best part of the job is meeting new people.

items.phrase: A typical day in my life
items.example: Let me describe a typical day in my life.
